prompt: I have an existing T-Systems portfolio at the project path provided. There are customer profiles for the grosse-energieversorger-de market in customers/grosse-energieversorger-de.json. Run the customer review assessor on the profiles and show me the results from all three perspectives (reviewer, CSO, market expert). If the verdict is revise, make the targeted improvements and re-assess. Maximum 2 revision rounds.

assertions.text: Assessment JSON output present with all three perspectives (reviewer, cso, market_expert)
Each perspective has 5 scored criteria with pass/warn/fail and weights
Verdict is accept, revise, or reject
If verdict is revise, revision round executed (max 2)
Final profile retains all required fields after revision
revision_guidance is non-empty when verdict is revise
